triumph-765-stock-fit.name: Triumph 765 STOCK (MotoSPEC fit)
triumph-765-stock-fit.note: Equivalence-class fit against the MotoSPEC oracle MR curve, with owner-supplied layout constraints (2026-07-16): rocker under the swingarm, linkarm frame anchor below the pivot, shock top forward of the rocker cluster. Kinematics exact; positions approximate.
